parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 300, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.claude_prompt }] }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT role_group FROM role_groups WHERE client_id = (SELECT id FROM company_config WHERE slug = $1) AND ($2 ILIKE ANY(keywords) OR $3 ILIKE ANY(keywords)) LIMIT 1

SELECT rg.*, cc.email_domain, cc.it_manager_slack_id, cc.hr_rep_slack_id, cc.slack_hr_channel, cc.slack_it_channel, cc.slack_finance_channel FROM role_groups rg JOIN company_config cc ON rg.client_id = cc.id WHERE cc.slug = $1 AND rg.role_group = $2 LIMIT 1
